reason: This task changes frontend build output, frontend API URL behavior, backend routing, and deployment docs.
Build/config changes should search and reuse existing scripts and constants before adding new helpers.
Backend spec index and pre-development checklist for route/static serving changes.

Backend route behavior must preserve API error/response conventions.
Any startup/static asset logging should follow redaction and structured logging rules.

Frontend spec index and pre-development checklist for Next build/export changes.

Static export compatibility may affect App Router client/server component boundaries.

Route shape and deployment contract reference because this task changes how frontend and backend are served together.
